title: Accessible Nether Roof
description: Access nether roof without using bugs!
body:
**Accessible Nether Roof** adds a new block type called "**Bad Rock**", this block generates in middle of the **nether roof** bedrocks but instead of being unbrekable Bad Rock **can be mined** with a diamond or netherite pickaxe.

Also you can craft Bad Rocks with **Bedrock Powder**(Has 30% chance to be droped when mining Bad Rocks).

In 1.1 NeoForge version is possible to **craft actual Bedrocks** when using Strong Regenaration potion with BadRock in Brewing Stand
